name: Prompt Crafting Lab
description: Hands-on coaching to write effective, precise AI prompts for real-world tasks.
author: Bell (design)
target_user: Anyone who uses AI tools and wants better results — from beginners to intermediate users.
trigger_keywords: How do I write better prompts?
My AI responses are not good enough
I want to get more from ChatGPT/Claude
use_cases: Structuring complex task descriptions for AI
